=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (14:21-14:35) TS377024: `Effect.runSync` is called inside an existing Effect context. Here, the inner Effect can be used directly. effect(runEffectInsideEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable runEffectInsideEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable runEffectInsideEffect for entire file"

[D2] (22:5-22:22) TS377074: `Effect.runPromise` is called inside an Effect with a separate services invocation. In this context, child Effects run with the surrounding services, which can be accessed through `Effect.context` and `Effect.runPromiseWith`. effect(runEffectInsideEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable runEffectInsideEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable runEffectInsideEffect for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Use the current services to run the Effect"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable runEffectInsideEffect for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable runEffectInsideEffect for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable runEffectInsideEffect for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable runEffectInsideEffect for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Use the current services to run the Effect" ===

--- file:///.src/runEffectInsideEffect.ts ---
import { Data, Effect } from "effect"

class DebuggerError extends Data.TaggedError("DebuggerError")<{
  cause: unknown
}> {}

export const program = Effect.gen(function*() {
const effectContext = yield* Effect.context<never>();

  const response = yield* Effect.tryPromise({
    try: () => fetch("http://localhost:9229"),
    catch: (e) => new DebuggerError({ cause: e })
  })
  const data = yield* Effect.promise(() => response.json())

  const websocket = Effect.runSync(Effect.sync(() => new WebSocket(data.url)))
  //                        ^- do not runSync in here

  websocket.onmessage = (event) => {
    const check = Effect.tryPromise({
      try: () => fetch(event.data as string),
      catch: (e) => new DebuggerError({ cause: e })
    })
    Effect.runPromiseWith(effectContext)(check)
    //        ^- no runPromise, use the current services instead
  }
})
